chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Bail Appln. No.S-430 of 2024. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of bail application. 21.08.2025 Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G assisted by Mr. Zain-ul- Abideen Abbasi, A.P.G. -.-.-.-.- Mr. Inam-ur-Rehman, advocate holds brief for Mr. Athar Abbas Solangi, advocate for the applicants, under the latter’s instructions, submits that the main case before the trial Court is at the verge of recording statements of the accused in terms of Section 342, Cr.P.C, hence seeks its disposal. Learned Addl. P. G has no objection. Since the main case is at the verge of conclusion, therefore, in view of case law reported as Rehmatullah v. The State and another (2011 SCMR 1332), the Courts should not grant or cancel bail when the trial is in progress and the proper course for the Courts in such a situation is to direct the trial Court to conclude the trial of the case within a specified period. Accordingly, instant bail application is hereby disposed of with direction to trial Court to expedite the trial and conclude it within shortest possible time preferably within forty five days. Let copy of this order be faxed to learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Shikarpur, (trial Court) for compliance. Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
